title: helichrysum oxybelium
intro: Helichrysum oxybelium, also known as the yellow cushion plant, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Helichrysum oxybelium stem from its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which help to soothe and protect the body. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Helichrysum oxybelium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils for topical application and internal use.
